tips: Open all windows to let fresh chi circulate through your home.
Add fresh flowers and green plants to every room.
Declutter your entryway — this is where spring chi enters.
Swap heavy winter curtains for light, airy fabrics.
Paint an accent wall in fresh green or soft pink.
Place a bowl of fresh fruit on your kitchen counter for abundance.
Clean your windows inside and out to welcome clarity.
Add wind chimes to your front door area.
Rearrange furniture slightly to invite new energy pathways.
Plant seeds (literal or metaphorical) in the southeast wealth corner.
seasons.rituals: Spring Cleaning Ceremony: Clean every corner while ringing a bell to break stagnant energy. Open all doors and windows for 10 minutes. Light a green or pink candle.

tips: Use bright red and gold accents throughout your home.
Host gatherings to activate the social energy of your space.
Place fresh sunflowers or bright blooms in the fame (south) area.
Use candles or warm lighting to amplify fire energy.
Display achievements and awards in the south area.
Keep your space cool and well-ventilated for comfort.
Add citrus scents — orange and lemon uplift chi.
Use mirrors to double the summer light and energy.
Wear bright colors to match the vibrant season.
Celebrate abundance by sharing meals with loved ones.
seasons.rituals: Abundance Activation: Light a red candle in the south area of your home. Write your biggest goal on gold paper and place it under the candle. Let it burn fully.

tips: Harvest what you've grown — acknowledge your accomplishments.
Clear out what no longer serves you — donate unused items.
Add white, silver and gray accents for metal energy.
Display dried flowers, wheat stalks or autumnal arrangements.
Strengthen the northwest (mentors) area with metal objects.
Organize your home office and financial documents.
Add cozy throws and warm textures for comfort.
Use soft yellow lighting to create a warm harvest feel.
Place a bowl of autumn fruits (pumpkins, apples) as abundance symbols.
Practice gratitude by writing what you're thankful for.
seasons.rituals: Release Ceremony: Write what you wish to release on paper. Burn it safely (in a fireplace or fireproof bowl) while stating your intention aloud. Replace with a symbol of what you wish to invite.

tips: Create cozy, warm spaces for introspection and rest.
Deep clean and organize your home for a fresh start.
Focus on the north (career) area — plan your professional goals.
Add blue, black and deep purple accents for water energy.
Use warm, layered lighting to counter the dark season.
Keep pathways clear to prevent energy stagnation.
Display crystals or water features in the north area.
Read and study in your knowledge (northeast) corner.
Practice meditation in a calm, dedicated space.
Prepare your home for the spring renewal to come.
seasons.rituals: Winter Intention Setting: On the winter solstice, light a dark blue or black candle. Meditate on your intentions for the coming year. Place written intentions in a box in the north (career) area until spring.
